name: From Pombal to Caldas da Rainha — Ciclovia da Estrada Atlântica
name_original: De Pombal às Caldas da Rainha — Ciclovia da Estrada Atlântica
region_intro: Touring cycling routes around Carriço are characterized by their proximity to the Atlantic coast and the presence of lagoons and natural scrubland, often referred to as matos do Carriço. The region offers a mix of coastal paths and inland trails, providing varied terrain for cyclists. Routes frequently feature views of the ocean and pass through areas with unique flora. The landscape generally presents gentle gradients, with some routes offering longer distances suitable for extended rides. Best touring cycling routes around Carriço The most popular touring cycling route is From Pombal to Caldas da Rainha — Ciclovia da Estrada Atlântica, a 56.3 miles (90.7 km) difficult trail that takes 5 hours 26 minutes to complete. This route follows the Atlantic Road cycle path, offering extensive coastal views. Another top favourite among local touring cyclists is Lagoa da Ervedeira – View of the Atlantic Ocean loop from Coimbrão, an easy 13.1 miles (21.1 km) path. This loop provides scenic views of Lagoa da Ervedeira and the Atlantic Ocean. Local touring cyclists also love the Lagoa da Ervedeira – EuroVelo 1 loop from Carriço, a 19.0 miles (30.6 km) trail leading through coastal areas and near the lagoon, often completed in about 1 hour 48 minutes. Touring cycling around Carriço is defined by coastal paths, lagoons, and natural scrubland, with options for different ability levels. The network includes easy touring bike trails Carriço distance, as well as more challenging routes. The routes in Carriço are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 3.8 stars from over 30 reviews. More than 150 touring cyclists have used komoot to explore Carriço's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on touring cycling routes around Carriço?
A: Touring cycling routes in Carriço are characterized by their proximity to the Atlantic coast, featuring coastal paths and inland trails. You'll encounter lagoons and natural scrubland, often referred to as &lt;em&gt;matos do Carriço&lt;/em&gt;. The landscape generally presents gentle gradients, offering varied terrain with unique flora and frequent ocean views.

Q: Are there easy touring cycling routes suitable for beginners in Carriço?
A: Yes, Carriço offers several easy touring cycling routes. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/21948299" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lagoa da Ervedeira – View of the Atlantic Ocean loop from Coimbrão&lt;/a&gt; is an easy 13.1-mile (21.1 km) path that provides scenic views of Lagoa da Ervedeira and the Atlantic Ocean.

Q: Are there any challenging touring cycling routes for experienced cyclists?
A: For experienced touring cyclists seeking a challenge, the region offers routes like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2274978829/from-pombal-to-caldas-da-rainha-ciclovia-da-estrada-atlantica" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;From Pombal to Caldas da Rainha — Ciclovia da Estrada Atlântica&lt;/a&gt;. This difficult 56.3-mile (90.7 km) route follows the Atlantic Road cycle path, offering extensive coastal views and a longer ride.

Q: Can I find circular touring cycling routes in Carriço?
A: Yes, many touring cycling routes in Carriço are designed as loops. A popular option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/32161749" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lagoa da Ervedeira – EuroVelo 1 loop from Carriço&lt;/a&gt;, a 19.0-mile (30.6 km) trail leading through coastal areas and near the lagoon.

Q: What are some scenic viewpoints or attractions along the touring cycling routes?
A: Along the routes, you can enjoy scenic views of the Atlantic Ocean and natural landmarks. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/841056" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lagoa da Ervedeira&lt;/a&gt; is a prominent feature, and parts of the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2918935" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Estrada Atlântica Cycle Path&lt;/a&gt; offer beautiful coastal vistas. You might also pass through areas like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/7284034" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Leiria National Forest&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What do other touring cyclists say about the routes in Carriço?
A: The touring cycling routes in Carriço are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 3.8 stars from over 30 reviews. Cyclists often praise the varied terrain, the beautiful coastal views, and the well-maintained paths that allow for enjoyable rides.

Q: Are there any routes that are particularly good for families?
A: Routes with gentle gradients and shorter distances are generally suitable for families. The easy &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/21948299" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lagoa da Ervedeira – View of the Atlantic Ocean loop from Coimbrão&lt;/a&gt; is a good option, offering scenic views on a manageable 13.1-mile (21.1 km) path.

Q: Is public transport available to access the touring cycling routes in Carriço?
A: While specific public transport connections directly to trailheads can vary, Carriço is a regional center. It's advisable to check local bus schedules or train services to nearby towns like Pombal or Caldas da Rainha, which may offer connections or starting points for some routes, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e2274978829/from-pombal-to-caldas-da-rainha-ciclovia-da-estrada-atlantica" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ciclovia da Estrada Atlântica&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Where can I find parking near the touring cycling routes?
A: Parking is generally available in the towns and villages near the starting points of the routes, such as Carriço itself, Coimbrão, or Guia. For routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/32156227" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Start of the Atlantic Road – Osso da Baleia Beach loop from Lago da Fonte da Pedra&lt;/a&gt;, you can often find parking near the beach areas or designated trail access points.

Q: What is the best time of year to go touring cycling in Carriço?
A: The coastal climate of Carriço generally offers pleasant conditions for cycling for much of the year. Spring and autumn typically provide mild temperatures and fewer crowds, making them ideal. Summer can be warm, especially inland, but coastal breezes can make rides enjoyable. Winter is generally mild but can bring more rain.

Q: Are there any routes that follow the EuroVelo 1 cycle path?
A: Yes, some routes in Carriço incorporate sections of the EuroVelo 1, also known as the Atlantic Coast Route. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/32161749" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lagoa da Ervedeira – EuroVelo 1 loop from Carriço&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/19431352" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lagoa da Ervedeira – EuroVelo 1 loop from Guia&lt;/a&gt; both utilize parts of this international cycling network.
tips: This wonderful bike path, well separated from the road, crosses the Mata Nacional do Urso, one of the largest pine forests in the central region. The predominant plant species is pine, whose wood was used for the construction of Portuguese caravels.
Beautiful lagoon with a small sandy beach and good for swimming. There are also toilets and a café there.

Praia Velha is a beach located in the parish of São Pedro de Moel, in the municipality of Marinha Grande, district of Leiria, in Portugal.

Characteristics: It is known for its extensive sandy area and fantastic dunes with vegetation. It has wooden walkways that facilitate access and is considered a quiet beach, suitable for both swimming and relaxing walks. It is a family beach, with good conditions for children, sometimes including a stretch of freshwater with fewer waves.

Getting here is no joke: the climb is short, but the inclines will take your breath away. On the other hand, the view of Nazaré and the coast south of the city is spectacular. 
The road has little traffic.

waypoints.name: Beautiful cycle path through the Mata do Urso
